name: Club 72 Golf Simulators LLC
about: Club 72 Golf Simulators, LLC is an indoor golf facility specializing in data-driven swing analysis and personalized coaching using Trackman technology. The venue offers private lessons for golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, with a focus on real-time performance insights and measurable improvement. Memberships and loyalty programs provide additional benefits, including cash back on purchases. While primarily a training-focused environment, the facility also supports casual practice sessions through its hourly booking system and special events like kids' clinics.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven coaching with Trackman technology for precise swing analysis
Experienced PGA-certified instructors providing personalized guidance
Flexible scheduling with online booking and multiple coach availability
Loyalty program offering 5% cash back on all purchases
State-of-the-art indoor facility for focused, year-round practice

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman technology is used for all lessons and coaching sessions

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether club rentals are available. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of outside food or drink policies on the website. It appears to be a training-focused facility without on-site dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't provide specific timing for 18-hole rounds. Booking is done by time slots for bay rental, with lessons available in 30-minute increments.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers kids' clinics specifically designed for young golfers to learn the game in a fun environment. They also have small group coaching with a maximum of 3 kids per session.
